Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey, mind if I go take a look at some earrings?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I've been wanting new ones, but I can never seem to make up my mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}They're all so cute, y'know? There are too many options to choose from![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I know! Why don't you come help me pick something out, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Wait! It's fine! You can do what you wanna do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}If that's what you really want, then go ahead. It's your choice, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You really don't have to worry about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Do you want to meet up and talk about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I'll try to call you more too, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}She apologized for everything that's happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}She said she won't get remarried until I'm okay with it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}That's weird... I can't stop shaking for some reason.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sat with Yukari until she calmed down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Sorry about all that. I'm fine now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I never expected this to happen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I told her we could meet up and talk about her remarriage. I'm nervous just thinking about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}To tell you the truth, I don't think it should be about me "letting" her or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I don't exactly want to... I'm afraid it might get ugly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}We haven't seen each other in almost ten years, so it's... not going to be easy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I'm afraid I'll get angry and say something cruel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Still... I think it's time I try talking to her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I've been saying how wrong it is to run away, so I need to live up to my own advice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}You know, I think she still misses my dad, deep down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}But she couldn't handle it... Losing someone so important to her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}That's why she needed someone to lean on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I think... losing someone you love and having to go on alone is really, really hard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I'm not sure how to explain, but I realized this after being with you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I think being in love means giving a part of yourself away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari's feelings are coming out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}I realized this after spending time with you and the others from the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}There are a lot of people who support me. And that's a wonderful thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}But my mom didn't have anyone like that. So all she could do was cling on to whoever she could...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I think... losing someone you love and having to go on alone is really, really hard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}But I still think it's wrong to jump into relationships for a reason like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari is trusting in me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}The earrings can wait till next time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Let's just go home for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
